sentences.target: Ich sehe den Berg hinter dem Dorf.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzeːə deːn bɛʁk ˈhɪntɐ deːm dɔʁf/

translations.de: Ich sehe den Berg hinter dem Dorf.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzeːə deːn bɛʁk ˈhɪntɐ deːm dɔʁf/
translations.en: I see the mountain behind the village.
translations.es: Veo la montaña detrás del pueblo.
translations.fr: Je vois la montagne derrière le village.
translations.it: Vedo la montagna dietro il paese.
translations.pt: Vejo a montanha atrás da aldeia.
translations.he: אני רואה את ההר מאחורי הכפר.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy ngọn núi phía sau ngôi làng.
translations.nl: Ik zie de berg achter het dorp.
translations.hu: Látom a hegyet a falu mögött.
translations.hi: मुझे गाँव के पीछे का पहाड़ दिख रहा है।
translations.el: Βλέπω το βουνό πίσω από το χωριό.
translations.id: Saya melihat gunung di belakang desa.
translations.ja: 村の後ろにある山が見える。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st-person singular present; takes a direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Berg' as direct object.
Common noun (masc.); direct object in the accusative.
Preposition meaning 'behind', governing the dative for static location; introduces a PP.
Definite article, dative singular (here with neuter noun); determiner of 'Dorf'.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'hinter' (dative).

sentences.target: Wir wandern heute auf den Berg.

translations.de: Wir wandern heute auf den Berg.
translations.en: We are hiking up the mountain today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, nous partons en randonnée dans la montagne.
translations.it: Oggi saliamo su per la montagna.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi leo núi.
translations.nl: Vandaag wandelen we de berg op.
translations.hi: आज हम पहाड़ पर चढ़ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: I dag går vi opp på fjellet.
translations.sv: I dag går vi upp på berget.
translations.da: I dag går vi op ad bjerget.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; clause subject.
Finite main verb, 1st-person plural present; motion verb.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Preposition; with accusative here indicates direction (goal of motion).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Berg'.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'auf' (goal).

sentences.target: Der Berg ist neben dem kleinen See.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ bɛʁk ɪst ˈneːbən deːm ˈklaɪnən zeː/

translations.de: Der Berg ist neben dem kleinen See.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ bɛʁk ɪst ˈneːbən deːm ˈklaɪnən zeː/
translations.en: The mountain is next to the small lake.
translations.es: La montaña está al lado del lago pequeño.
translations.fr: La montagne est à côté du petit lac.
translations.it: La montagna è accanto al piccolo lago.
translations.ru: Гора находится рядом с небольшим озером.
translations.pt: A montanha fica ao lado do pequeno lago.
translations.vi: Ngọn núi nằm cạnh hồ nhỏ.
translations.nl: De berg ligt naast het kleine meer.
translations.uk: Гора знаходиться поруч з маленьким озером.
translations.hu: A hegy a kis tó mellett van.
translations.hi: पहाड़ छोटी झील के पास है।
translations.el: Το βουνό είναι δίπλα στη μικρή λίμνη.
translations.nb: Fjellet ligger ved den lille innsjøen.
translations.id: Gunung itu berada di sebelah danau kecil.
translations.sv: Berget ligger bredvid den lilla sjön.
translations.da: Bjerget ligger ved den lille sø.
translations.ja: 山は小さな湖のそばにある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject 'Berg'.
Common noun (masc.); syntactic subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd-person singular present; links subject to predicate.
Preposition meaning 'beside/next to', governing the dative; introduces a PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'See'.
Attributive adjective inflected for dative masculine singular; modifies 'See'.
Common noun (masc. meaning 'lake'); object of the preposition 'neben'.

sentences.target: Am Berg wartet Mia mit dem Hund.
sentences.reading: /am bɛʁk ˈvaʁtət ˈmiːa mɪt deːm hʊnt/

translations.de: Am Berg wartet Mia mit dem Hund.
translations.ipa: /am bɛʁk ˈvaʁtət ˈmiːa mɪt deːm hʊnt/
translations.en: At the mountain, Mia is waiting with the dog.
translations.es: En la montaña, Mia está esperando con el perro.
translations.fr: Mia attend avec le chien à la montagne.
translations.it: Mia aspetta con il cane in montagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 在山上，米娅带着狗等着。
translations.ru: У горы Миа ждёт с собакой.
translations.pt: Na montanha, Mia está esperando com o cachorro.
translations.vi: Ở núi, Mia đang đợi với con chó.
translations.ar: عند الجبل، ميا تنتظر مع الكلب.
translations.nl: Bij de berg wacht Mia met de hond.
translations.uk: Біля гори Мія чекає з собакою.
translations.hu: A hegyen Mia a kutyával vár.
translations.hi: पहाड़ पर मिया कुत्ते के साथ इंतज़ार कर रही है।
translations.pl: Pod górą Mia czeka z psem.
translations.el: Στο βουνό, η Μία περιμένει με τον σκύλο.
translations.nb: Ved fjellet venter Mia med hunden.
translations.id: Di gunung, Mia sedang menunggu bersama anjing.
translations.sv: Vid berget väntar Mia med hunden.
translations.ro: La munte, Mia așteaptă cu câinele.
translations.cs: U hory Mia čeká se psem.
translations.da: Ved bjerget venter Mia med hunden.
translations.ja: 山でミアは犬と待っている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of preposition 'an' + article 'dem'; heads a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'an' (dative) in 'Am Berg'.
Finite main verb, 3rd-person singular present; occupies V2 position.
Proper noun; clause subject (nominative), post-verbal due to fronted PP.
Preposition 'with' governing the dative; introduces a comitative PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Hund'.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'mit'.
